title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what causes water scarcity and what impact it has on people's daily lives and livelihoods.

images.label: A
images.description: Women and children in a dry, arid region walking long distances carrying large yellow containers to collect water from a distant source

images.label: B
images.description: A cracked and dried-out riverbed with almost no water remaining, dead fish visible on the parched ground and withered vegetation on the banks

followUp.question: What do you think are the most urgent measures needed to address water scarcity globally?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what challenges people face in managing waste effectively and what role recycling plays in protecting the environment.

images.label: D
images.description: A worker at a recycling plant sorting through a conveyor belt of mixed plastic, glass and metal items, wearing protective gloves and a high-vis vest

images.label: E
images.description: A coastal clean-up volunteer collecting plastic bottles and bags from a polluted beach, with a large overflowing bin bag beside them

followUp.question: Do you think individual recycling efforts make a significant difference, or is the responsibility mainly with governments and industry?
